eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Madison, KY; at 06:19 PM ON FEB 18, 2026 Effective until 07:19 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Golden Alert D (missing) for William (Trey) Patrick.  White male, 5 feet 6 inches tall 160 pounds. Last seen wearing blue jeans, black coat, and a black and white hat around the area of Adams Point Mobile Home Park (near I-75 Exit 95) If seen call Madison Co E911 at 8596244772
